subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Dec. 1911
subcodes.first_line: The world is wrong, just because people talk too much and do not carry out their ideals
subcodes.subjects: @words vs deeds, @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others, @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf], @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge
